event.rest.title: A Quiet Refuge
event.rest.text.1:
You set up camp inside a narrow cavern, the chill of the stone walls offering little comfort.
Fatigue wraps around you like a heavy cloak, and before long, sleep takes hold.
event.rest.choice.1.after:
You feel your strength returning.
Your health is fully restored.
event.shop.title: A Merchant's Offer
event.shop.text.1:
An older man shuffles toward you, his cart groaning with age and rust.
'Take a look at my wares... will you?' he rasps, eyes glinting beneath his hood.
event.shop.choice.1.after:
'Splendid.. Here's what I have to offer..!' You peruse the old man's cart.
Opening the shop...
event.shop.choice.2.after:
You decide not to engage with the old man, he nods understandingly as you walk away.
Nothing happened.
event.weepingstatue.title: The Weeping Statue
event.weepingstatue.text.1:
A solemn statue looms atop a crumbling pedestal, silent tears of blood streaking its stone face.
It compels you to take it... Will you?
event.weepingstatue.choice.1.after:
You carefully lift the Weeping Statue from its pedestal.
Relic obtained: 'Weeping Statue'
event.weepingstatue.choice.2.after:
You decide to leave the statue undisturbed.
Nothing happened.
event.masks.title: The Dual Masks
event.masks.text.1:
Two ornate masks rest atop a stone slab—one carved in joy, the other twisted in sorrow.
A whisper slithers into your thoughts: 'Choose a face to wear... but know the mask may wear you.'
event.masks.choice.1.after:
A warm light envelops you as you don the joyful mask.
Relic obtained: 'Mask Of Joy'
event.masks.choice.2.after:
A cold darkness seeps into your bones as you wear the sorrowful mask.
Relic obtained: 'Mask Of Sorrow'
event.masks.choice.3.after:
You ignore the masks and continue on your way.
Nothing happened.
